content:
## Research Results: All URLs and Resource Confirmations

Here are the verified findings for all 8 items:

---

### 1. Unsloth Google Colab Notebook — LLaMA 3 8B QLoRA Fine-Tuning

**✅ CONFIRMED — Available**

| Resource | URL |
|---|---|
| **Llama 3 8B Instruct Colab** | `https://colab.research.google.com/github/unslothai/notebooks/blob/main/nb/Llama_3_8b_Instruct_2x_faster_finetuning.ipynb` |
| **Llama 3.1 8B Alpaca Colab** | `https://colab.research.google.com/github/unslothai/notebooks/blob/main/nb/Llama_3.1_(8B)-Alpaca.ipynb` |
| **GitHub Notebooks Repo** | `https://github.com/unslothai/notebooks` |
| **Official Docs (full catalog)** | `https://docs.unsloth.ai/get-started/notebooks` |

Key details:
- Uses `load_in_4bit = True` for QLoRA
- Runs on free Colab T4 GPU
- Supports export to GGUF for Ollama/llama.cpp
- 2x faster training, significantly less VRAM

---

### 2. Unsloth Kaggle Notebook

**✅ CONFIRMED — Available**

| Resource | URL |
|---|---|
| **Kaggle Profile (all notebooks)** | `https://www.kaggle.com/unslothai` |
| **Llama-3 8B Kaggle Notebook** | `https://www.kaggle.com/code/unslothai/llama-3-8b-unsloth-notebook` |
| **Llama-3.1 8B Kaggle Notebook** | `https://www.kaggle.com/code/unslothai/llama-3-1-8b-unsloth-notebook` |
| **Llama 3.2 1B/3B Kaggle Notebook** | `https://www.kaggle.com/code/unslothai/llama-3-2-1b-3b-unsloth-notebook` |

Note: Unsloth installation may take a few minutes on Kaggle. Uses Kaggle's free T4 GPU.

---

### 3. marketeam/LLa-Marketing on HuggingFace

**✅ CONFIRMED — Exists and is Unsloth-compatible**

| Detail | Info |
|---|---|
| **URL** | `https://huggingface.co/marketeam/LLa-Marketing` |
| **Base Architecture** | Llama-3-8B (8B parameters) |
| **Format** | Safetensors (standard HF format) |
| **Unsloth Compatible?** | **Yes** — Unsloth supports the Llama-3 architecture. Can be loaded via its HF ID. |
| **Access** | **Gated model** — requires HF login and agreement to Llama 3 Community License |
| **Purpose** | Marketing-domain fine-tuned model for content generation, research, campaigns |

Can be converted to GGUF using `llama.cpp`'s `convert_hf_to_gguf.py` if needed.

---

### 4. marketeam/Gem-Marketing and marketeam/Phi-Marketing

**✅ BOTH CONFIRMED — Exist**

| Model | URL | Size | Type |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Gem-Marketing** | `https://huggingface.co/marketeam/Gem-Marketing` | ~3B parameters | Text-generation (Gemma-based) |
| **Phi-Marketing** | `https://huggingface.co/marketeam/Phi-Marketing` | ~4B parameters | Text-generation (Phi-based) |

Both are marketing-domain fine-tuned models. The Phi-Marketing model has been used by the community for further fine-tuning and model merging (e.g., DELLA merge method). Organization page: `https://huggingface.co/marketeam`

---

### 5. AdvertiseGen Dataset

**⚠️ PARTIALLY CONFIRMED — Different namespace than expected**

The dataset does **NOT** exist at `open-datalab/AdvertiseGen` on HuggingFace. Instead, it's hosted under:

| Detail | Info |
|---|---|
| **Correct HF URL** | `https://huggingface.co/datasets/shibing624/AdvertiseGen` |
| **Origin** | Tsinghua University CoAI Group, also on OpenDataLab platform (opendatalab.com) |
| **Records** | **118K total**: Training = **114K**, Validation = 1K, Test = 3K ✅ |
| **Content** | Chinese e-commerce advertising copy generation (product attributes → marketing copy) |

The 114K training record count is **confirmed**.

---

### 6. Ateeqq/Amazon-Product-Description Dataset

**✅ CONFIRMED — 421K records**

| Detail | Info |
|---|---|
| **URL** | `https://huggingface.co/datasets/Ateeqq/Amazon-Product-Description` |
| **Records** | **421K unique examples** ✅ |
| **Origin** | Cleaned subset from ~10M Amazon product dataset (by exnrt.com) |
| **Cleaning** | Removed empty rows, filtered descriptions <200 chars, removed non-ASCII |
| **Access** | Public, may require login + accepting conditions |

---

### 7. vectara/hallucination_evaluation_model

**✅ CONFIRMED — Exists with full usage instructions**

| Detail | Info |
|---|---|
| **URL** | `https://huggingface.co/vectara/hallucination_evaluation_model` |
| **Type** | Cross-encoder model (HHEM — Hughes Hallucination Evaluation Model) |
| **Purpose** | Detect factual inconsistencies (hallucinations) between premise/context and generated text |

**Usage with sentence-transformers (recommended):**
```python
from sentence_transformers import CrossEncoder

model = CrossEncoder('vectara/hallucination_evaluation_model')

pairs = [
    ["The capital of France is Paris.", "The capital of France is Paris."],  # consistent
    ["The capital of France is Paris.", "The capital of France is Berlin."]  # hallucination
]

scores = model.predict(pairs)
print(scores)  # Higher score = more factually consistent
```

**Usage with transformers:**
```python
from transformers import AutoTokenizer, AutoModelForSequenceClassification
import torch

model_name = "vectara/hallucination_evaluation_model"
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_name)
model = AutoModelForSequenceClassification.from_pretrained(model_name, trust_remote_code=True)

inputs = tokenizer("source text", "hypothesis text", return_tensors='pt')
with torch.no_grad():
    logits = model(**inputs).logits
```

Key notes: Asymmetric input — premise (source/evidence) must be first, hypothesis (text to evaluate) second. Score < 0.5 suggests hallucination.

---

### 8. Defactify_Text_Dataset

**✅ CONFIRMED — 73K+ records**

| Detail | Info |
|---|---|
| **URL** | `https://huggingface.co/datasets/Rajarshi-Roy-research/Defactify_Text_Dataset` |
| **Records** | **73,193 text samples** ✅ (73K+) |
| **Purpose** | AI-generated vs human-written text detection + model attribution |
| **Content** | Human-written news (NYT) paired with AI-generated versions |
| **AI Models Used** | GPT-4o, Gemma-2-9b, Mistral-7B, Qwen-2-72B, LLaMA-8B, Yi-Large |
| **Tasks** | Binary detection (human vs AI) + Multi-class model attribution |
| **Associated With** | Defactify workshop series (AAAI conferences) |

---

### Summary Table

| # | Resource | Status | URL |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Unsloth Colab (LLaMA 3 8B) | ✅ Available | `https://colab.research.google.com/github/unslothai/notebooks/blob/main/nb/Llama_3_8b_Instruct_2x_faster_finetuning.ipynb` |
| 2 | Unsloth Kaggle | ✅ Available | `https://www.kaggle.com/code/unslothai/llama-3-8b-unsloth-notebook` |
| 3 | marketeam/LLa-Marketing | ✅ Exists (safetensors, Unsloth-compatible, gated) | `https://huggingface.co/marketeam/LLa-Marketing` |
| 4a | marketeam/Gem-Marketing | ✅ Exists (~3B) | `https://huggingface.co/marketeam/Gem-Marketing` |
| 4b | marketeam/Phi-Marketing | ✅ Exists (~4B) | `https://huggingface.co/marketeam/Phi-Marketing` |
| 5 | AdvertiseGen | ⚠️ Different namespace | `https://huggingface.co/datasets/shibing624/AdvertiseGen` (NOT open-datalab) |
| 6 | Amazon-Product-Description | ✅ 421K confirmed | `https://huggingface.co/datasets/Ateeqq/Amazon-Product-Description` |
| 7 | vectara/hallucination_evaluation_model | ✅ Exists | `https://huggingface.co/vectara/hallucination_evaluation_model` |
| 8 | Defactify_Text_Dataset | ✅ 73,193 records confirmed | `https://huggingface.co/datasets/Rajarshi-Roy-research/Defactify_Text_Dataset` |
